headline: 1 High-Flying Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Avoid
summary: Expensive stocks typically earn their valuations through superior growth rates that other companies simply can’t match. The flip side though is that these lofty expectations make them particularly susceptible to drawdowns when market sentiment shifts.

headline: FICO Announces Proposed Offering of $1.0 Billion in Senior Notes
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., March 11, 2026--Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE: FICO) announced today that it intends to offer, subject to market and certain other conditions, $1.0 billion in aggregate principal amount of Senior Notes due 2034 (the "Notes") in a private offering that is exempt from registration under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the "Securities Act"). The Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of FICO.

The Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of FICO.

headline: FICO Launches Digital Tool Hub to Help Lenders Accelerate Credit Risk Strategy Innovation and Advance Financial Inclusion
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., March 11, 2026--FICO launches the FICO Score Credit Insights Lab, a platform with interactive benchmarking and modeling tools to help lenders expand credit access.
